title: grewia bilocularis
intro: Grewia bilocularis is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the bilocular hawthorn or Indian hawthorn. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and fever, as well as its use as a treatment for digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Grewia bilocularis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
